ideas: Sketch everything on your desk right now as a still life
Draw your non-dominant hand in 5 different positions
Sketch a face using only geometric shapes
Draw the view from your nearest window
Fill a page with 20 thumbnail doodles of random objects around you
Paint a 3-color limited palette landscape (pick any 3)
Do a loose watercolor of something you can see right now
Paint a simple portrait from a reference photo on your phone
Try wet-on-wet watercolor and let it do its own thing
Paint the same object 4 times in 4 different lighting moods
Create a bold black-and-white pattern using only straight lines
Letter your name in 5 completely different hand-lettering styles
Draw a city skyline in silhouette with a single marker
Fill a page with repeating pattern tiles
Ink a detailed zentangle or geometric mandala
Make a collage from old magazines using only one color family
Create a vision board for a fictional character
Tear and layer paper scraps into an abstract landscape
Make a mini zine — fold one sheet of paper into 8 panels and fill them
Design a fake album cover for an imaginary band
Make a poster for a movie that doesn't exist
Redesign the logo of your favorite brand from scratch
Create a 3-color minimal travel poster for your city
Design a fake restaurant menu with a specific aesthetic
Carve a simple linocut stamp and print a pattern with it
Make a monoprint by rolling ink on glass and pressing paper
Create potato stamps and tile them into a repeating pattern
Print with found objects — leaves, bubble wrap, cardboard edges
Design a full brand identity for a fake small business (logo, colors, font)
Create a mood board for a brand aesthetic you find interesting
Redesign your own personal logo or initials as a monogram
Pick a local business you love and redesign their visual identity
Hand-letter a quote you like in three different styles
Design a custom alphabet from scratch with a consistent theme
Create a typographic poster using only words and layout, no images
Recreate a famous logo from memory, then compare
Sculpt a small figure or animal from air-dry clay or tin foil
Build a small architectural model from cardboard and tape
Learn one new origami fold you've never done before
Make a paper sculpture that can stand on its own
Shoot 10 photos with a strict constraint (only circles, only shadows, only red things)
Recreate a famous painting as a photo using stuff around your house
Create a flat lay composition on your floor and photograph it
Shoot a 5-image visual story with no people in any frame
